subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Divine Threshold! Divine relief cometh after distress, and gladness followeth after sorrow, and joy succeedeth grief [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده درگاه الهی فرج الهی فرح بعد از کدر و سرور بعد از غموم و شادی بعد از
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @consolation and comfort, @the ephemeral and the eternal
